popularStory.headline: Henry de Percy, 1st Baron Percy born 1273

zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry Percy於1299年2月6日出生在英國諾圖波藍德阿恩維克時，他的父親Sir Henry de Percy25歲，母親Eleanor FitzAlan14歲。他於大約1314年與Idonea de Clifford在英國越可爾結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他於1323年登記服兵役。他去世於1352年2月17日在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯享年53歲，埋葬在英國諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry Percy于1299年2月6日出生在英国諾圖波藍德阿恩維克时，他的父亲Sir Henry de Percy25岁，母亲Eleanor FitzAlan14岁。他于大约1314年与Idonea de Clifford在英国越可爾结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他于1323年登记服兵役。他去世于1352年2月17日在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯享年53岁，埋葬在英国諾圖波藍德瓦可沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Percy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: nickname from Old French percehaie ‘pierce hedge’ (Old French percer ‘to pierce, penetrate’ + haie ‘hedge, fence’), perhaps with the sense of someone breaking into an enclosure. Percehaie is the name of one of the sons of the foxes Renart and Hermeline in the medieval French epic Roman de Renart, whose earliest known version is from the 1170s. The surname is older than that, but it may originate in a nickname for the fox as ‘enclosure piercer’, perhaps amounting to ‘chicken thief’.

habitational name from any of several places called Percy in Calvados, Eure, and Manche; William de Perci, the Domesday tenant-in-chief and under-tenant of Hugh, Earl of Chester, came from either Percy-en-Auge (Eure) or Percy (Manche).

variants.name: Piercey
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

variants.name: Piercy
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Percy  .

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry Percy was born on 6 February 1299, in Alnwick, Northumberland, England, his father, Sir Henry de Percy, was 25 and his mother, Eleanor FitzAlan, was 14. He married Idonea de Clifford about 1314, in Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 4 daughters. He registered for military service in 1323. He died on 17 February 1352, in Warkworth, Northumberland, England, at the age of 53, and was buried in Warkworth, Northumberland, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry Percy est né le 6 février 1299, à Alnwick, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Sir Henry de Percy, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Eleanor FitzAlan, avait 14 ans. Il a épousé Idonea de Clifford environ 1314, à Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 4 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1323. Il est décédé le 17 février 1352, à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 53 ans, et a été enterré à Warkworth, Northumberland, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry Percy am 6. Februar 1299 in Alnwick, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Henry de Percy 25 und seine Mutter Eleanor FitzAlan 14. Er hat um 1314 in Yorkshire, England Idonea de Clifford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Er hat sich 1323 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 17. Februar 1352 im Alter von 53 Jahren in Warkworth, Northumberland, England und wurde in Warkworth, Northumberland, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy è nato il il 6 febbraio 1299 nel Alnwick, Northumberland, England, il suo padre, Sir Henry de Percy, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Eleanor FitzAlan, aveva 14 anni. Lui sposato Idonea de Clifford circa 1314, nel Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 4 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1323. Morì il 17 febbraio 1352, nel Warkworth, Northumberland, England, all'età di 53 anni, e fu sepolto a Warkworth, Northumberland, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry Percyが1299年2月6日にイギリスノースウンバーランドアルンウィックで生まれた時，父Sir Henry de Percyは25歳，母Eleanor FitzAlanは14歳であった。約1314年にイギリスヨークシュアイアでIdonea de Cliffordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1323年に兵役登録をした。彼は1352年2月17日にイギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスで53歳で死去し，イギリスノースウンバーランドワークウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry Percy(이)가 1299년 2월 6일 영국 노르스벌랜드 알윅에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Henry de Percy(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Eleanor FitzAlan(은)는 14세였다. 그는 대략 1314년 영국 요르크실르에서 Idonea de Clifford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1323년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1352년 2월 17일 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에서 53세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르스벌랜드 워k워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry Percy nasceu em 6 de fevereiro de 1299, em Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Henry de Percy, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Eleanor FitzAlan, tinha 14 anos. Ele casou-se com Idonea de Clifford aproximadamente 1314, em Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 4 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1323. Ele faleceu em 17 de fevereiro de 1352, em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, com 53 anos, e foi sepultado em Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry Percy родился 6 февраля 1299 г. в местности алнвикк, нортумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Henry de Percy было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Eleanor FitzAlan, 14. Он женился на женщине по имени Idonea de Clifford около 1314 г. в местности еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 4 дочери. В 1323 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 17 февраля 1352 г. в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия в возрасте 53 лет и был похоронен в местности варкворт, нортумбирланд, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry Percy nació el 6 de febrero de 1299, en Alnwick, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Henry de Percy, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Eleanor FitzAlan, tenía 14 años. Se casó con Idonea de Clifford aproximadamente 1314, en Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 4 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1323. Murió el 17 de febrero de 1352, en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra, a la edad de 53 años, y fue sepultado en Warkworth, Northumberland, Inglaterra.
